    footerSlot: ReactNode — content rendered in a sticky footer below the scroll area (e.g., "View all" link)
    emptyState: ReactNode — replaces the default empty state UI when there are no notifications
    headerActions: ReactNode — extra action buttons rendered after the "Mark all read" button in the header
    popoverClassName: string — override default popover dimensions via className
    onDismiss: (id: string) => void — when provided, each notification shows a dismiss/close button; called with the notification id
- Example:
  <NotificationCenter
    notifications={notifications}
    onMarkRead={markAsRead}
    onMarkAllRead={markAllAsRead}
    onNavigate={(path) => router.push(path)}
    getNotificationRoute={(n) => n.entityType === 'task' ? `/tasks/${n.entityId}` : null}
    onDismiss={(id) => dismissNotification(id)}
    footerSlot={<Link href="/notifications">View all notifications</Link>}
    emptyState={<p>You're all caught up!</p>}
    headerActions={<Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Settings</Button>}
    popoverClassName="w-[480px]"
  />

## NotificationPreferences
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/shell/notification-preferences
- Server-safe: No
- Props:
    preferences: NotificationPreference[]
    projects: NotificationProject[]
- Type: NotificationPreference = { id: string, userId?: string, projectId: string | null, channel: string, minTier: string, muted: boolean }
- Type: NotificationProject = { id: string, title: string }
    isLoading: boolean
    onSave: (preference: { projectId, channel, minTier, muted }) => void | Promise<void>
    onToggleMute: (preference: NotificationPreference) => void | Promise<void>
    onUpdateTier: (preference: NotificationPreference, newTier: string) => void | Promise<void>
    onDelete: (preferenceId: string) => void | Promise<void>
    className: string
- Example:
  <NotificationPreferences
    preferences={prefs}
    projects={projectList}
    onSave={handleSavePref}
    onToggleMute={handleToggleMute}
    onUpdateTier={handleUpdateTier}
    onDelete={handleDeletePref}
  />

## TopBar
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/shell/top-bar
- Server-safe: No
- Props:
    pageTitle: string
    user: TopBarUser | null — { name, email?, image? }
    onNavigate: (path: string) => void
    onLogout: () => void
    onSearchClick: () => void
    onAiChatClick: () => void
    mobileLogo: ReactNode
    notificationSlot: ReactNode (render NotificationCenter here)
    userMenuItems?: UserMenuItem[] — custom items between Profile and Dark/Light Mode toggle
    className: string
- Type: TopBarUser = { name: string, email?: string, image?: string | null }
- Type: UserMenuItem = { label: string, icon?: ReactNode, href?: string, onClick?: () => void, separator?: boolean, color?: string, badge?: string | boolean, disabled?: boolean }
    href — navigates via onNavigate callback
    onClick — custom action (takes precedence over href)
    separator — renders a DropdownMenuSeparator before this item
    color — semantic text color (e.g. "error" → text-error)
    badge — string for count badge, true for dot indicator
    disabled — greys out the item
- Example:
  <TopBar
    pageTitle="Dashboard"
    user={{ name: 'John', email: 'john@example.com' }}
    onNavigate={(p) => router.push(p)}
    onLogout={handleLogout}
    notificationSlot={<NotificationCenter notifications={notifications} />}
    userMenuItems={[
      { label: 'Changelog', icon: <IconNews />, href: '/changelog', badge: '3' },
      { label: 'Shortcuts', icon: <IconKeyboard />, onClick: () => openModal() },
    ]}
  />

---

# HOOKS
# Import from: @devalok/shilp-sutra/hooks/<hook-name>

---

## useToast (DEPRECATED)
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/hooks/use-toast
- DEPRECATED: Use import { toast } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra/ui/toast' instead
- The hooks/use-toast path re-exports the toast object for backward compatibility
- See Toast / Toaster section for the full imperative API

## useColorMode
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/hooks/use-color-mode
- Returns: { colorMode, setColorMode, toggleColorMode }
- colorMode: "light" | "dark" | "system"
- setColorMode(mode: "light" | "dark" | "system"): sets .dark class on html, persists to localStorage + cookie
- toggleColorMode(): toggles between light and dark
- Example:
  const { colorMode, toggleColorMode } = useColorMode()
  <Button onClick={toggleColorMode}>{colorMode === 'dark' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'}</Button>

## useIsMobile
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/hooks/use-mobile
- Returns: boolean (true if viewport width < 768px)
- Example:
  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
  {isMobile ? <BottomNavbar /> : <AppSidebar />}

---

# UTILITIES
# Import from: @devalok/shilp-sutra (barrel) or per-component path

---

## cn (className merge utility)
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra (barrel export)
- Usage: cn('base-class', condition && 'conditional-class', className)
- Merges Tailwind classes with clsx + twMerge

## getInitials
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/composed (barrel export)
- Usage: getInitials("John Doe") => "JD"

## generatePagination
- Import: @devalok/shilp-sutra/ui/pagination
- Usage: generatePagination(currentPage, totalPages, siblingCount)
- Returns: (number | 'ellipsis')[]

## Motion System (Framer Motion)
- Import presets: @devalok/shilp-sutra/motion — exports MotionProvider, useMotion, springs, tweens, stagger
- Import primitives: @devalok/shilp-sutra/motion/primitives — exports MotionFade, MotionScale, MotionPop, MotionSlide, MotionCollapse, MotionStagger, MotionStaggerItem
- See MotionProvider, useMotion, Spring Presets, Tween Presets, and individual primitive entries above for full API.
- MIGRATION: Old motion(category, mode), duration(token), easings, durations CSS token utilities are REMOVED. Use Framer Motion springs/tweens presets instead.
- MIGRATION: Old Fade/Collapse/Grow/Slide from @devalok/shilp-sutra/ui/transitions are REMOVED. Use MotionFade/MotionCollapse/MotionPop/MotionSlide from @devalok/shilp-sutra/motion/primitives. Prop `open` renamed to `show`, `unmountOnClose` removed, `duration` replaced by `preset`.
